/bin/bash -lc "cat > /app/solution.py <<'PY'
import json
import re
from collections import deque
from pathlib import Path


SECTION_RE = re.compile(r\""'^'"\\[(?P<id>["'^'"\\]]+)\\]\\s*"'$")
CHOICE_RE = re.compile(r"''^(?P<num>'"\\d+)\\.\\s*(?P<text>.+?)\\s*->\\s*(?P<target>[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\s*"'$")
LINE_RE = re.compile(r"''^(?:(?P<speaker>[''^:]+):'"\\s*)?(?P<text>.+?)\\s*->\\s*(?P<target>[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\s*"'$")


def _split_sections(text: str):
    sections = []
    current_id = None
    current_lines = []

    for raw_line in text.splitlines():
        line = raw_line.strip()
        if not line:
            continue

        match = SECTION_RE.match(line)
        if match:
            if current_id is not None:
                sections.append((current_id, current_lines))
            current_id = match.group("id").strip()
            current_lines = []
            continue

        if current_id is None:
            raise ValueError(f"Content found outside a section: {raw_line!r}")
        current_lines.append(line)

    if current_id is not None:
        sections.append((current_id, current_lines))

    if not sections:
        raise ValueError("No sections found in script")

    return sections


def parse_script(text: str):
    sections = _split_sections(text)
    nodes = []
    edges = []
    node_ids = set()

    for section_id, lines in sections:
        if section_id in node_ids:
            raise ValueError(f"Duplicate section id: {section_id}")
        if not lines:
            raise ValueError(f"Section {section_id} is empty")

        choice_matches = [CHOICE_RE.match(line) for line in lines]
        if all(choice_matches):
            nodes.append(
                {
                    "id": section_id,
                    "text": "",
                    "speaker": "",
                    "type": "choice",
                }
            )
            node_ids.add(section_id)
            for match in choice_matches:
                edges.append(
                    {
                        "from": section_id,
                        "to": match.group("target"),
                        "text": match.group("text").strip(),
                    }
                )
            continue

        if len(lines) != 1:
            raise ValueError(f"Section {section_id} mixes unsupported line types")

        match = LINE_RE.match(lines[0])
        if not match:
            raise ValueError(f"Could not parse section {section_id}: {lines[0]!r}")

        nodes.append(
            {
                "id": section_id,
                "text": match.group("text").strip(),
                "speaker": (match.group("speaker") or "").strip(),
                "type": "line",
            }
        )
        node_ids.add(section_id)
        edges.append(
            {
                "from": section_id,
                "to": match.group("target"),
                "text": "",
            }
        )

    graph = {"nodes": nodes, "edges": edges}
    validate_graph(graph)
    return graph


def validate_graph(graph):
    nodes = graph.get("nodes", [])
    edges = graph.get("edges", [])

    if not nodes:
        raise ValueError("Graph has no nodes")

    node_ids = [node["id"] for node in nodes]
    node_id_set = set(node_ids)
    if len(node_ids) != len(node_id_set):
        raise ValueError("Graph contains duplicate node ids")

    start_id = nodes[0]["id"]
    adjacency = {node_id: [] for node_id in node_ids}

    for edge in edges:
        source = edge["from"]
        target = edge["to"]
        if source not in node_id_set:
            raise ValueError(f"Edge source does not exist: {source}")
        if target not in node_id_set and target != "End":
            raise ValueError(f"Edge target does not exist: {target}")
        if target in node_id_set:
            adjacency[source].append(target)

    visited = set()
    queue = deque([start_id])
    while queue:
        current = queue.popleft()
        if current in visited:
            continue
        visited.add(current)
        queue.extend(adjacency[current])

    unreachable = [node_id for node_id in node_ids if node_id not in visited]
    if unreachable:
        raise ValueError(f"Unreachable nodes found: {'"', '.join(unreachable)}\")


def to_dot(graph):
    lines = [\"digraph Dialogue {\"]
    lines.append(\"  rankdir=LR;\")
    lines.append(\"  node [shape=box, style=rounded];\")

    for node in graph[\"nodes\"]:
        speaker = f\"{node['speaker']}: \" if node[\"speaker\"] else \"\"
        body = node[\"text\"] if node[\"text\"] else node[\"id\"]
        label = f\"{node['id']}\\\\n[{node['type']}]\\\\n{speaker}{body}\"
        label = label.replace('\"', r'\\\\\"')
        shape = \"diamond\" if node[\"type\"] == \"choice\" else \"box\"
        lines.append(f'  \"{node[\"id\"]}\" [shape={shape}, label=\"{label}\"];')

    if any(edge[\"to\"] == \"End\" for edge in graph[\"edges\"]):
        lines.append('  \"End\" [shape=oval, label=\"End\"];')

    for edge in graph[\"edges\"]:
        label = edge[\"text\"].replace('\"', r'\\\\\"')
        if label:
            lines.append(f'  \"{edge[\"from\"]}\" -> \"{edge[\"to\"]}\" [label=\"{label}\"];')
        else:
            lines.append(f'  \"{edge[\"from\"]}\" -> \"{edge[\"to\"]}\";')

    lines.append(\"}\")
    return \"\\n\".join(lines) + \"\\n\"


def main():
    root = Path(\"/app\")
    script_path = root / \"script.txt\"
    json_path = root / \"dialogue.json\"
    dot_path = root / \"dialogue.dot\"

    graph = parse_script(script_path.read_text())
    json_path.write_text(json.dumps(graph, indent=2) + \"\\n\")
    dot_path.write_text(to_dot(graph))


if __name__ == \"__main__\":
    main()
PY
